description_long: This is a modern white police car with a streamlined sedan body, equipped with a prominent roof-mounted light bar featuring red, blue, and white segments. The vehicle displays a distinctive police livery, including blue and red horizontal stripes running along the sides and a large, colorful police badge insignia on the front doors. The front of the car is fitted with a robust push bumper, and the windows are tinted for privacy. The wheels are standard black with visible hubcaps, and the rear features dual red taillights and a visible license plate. Antennas are mounted on the roof and trunk, indicating communication equipment typical for law enforcement vehicles.
description: A white police sedan with red and blue stripes, a roof light bar, police insignia, and a front push bumper.
description_view_0: Front view showing the push bumper, grille, windshield, and the roof-mounted light bar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the police badge, colored stripes, and the full length of the light bar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillights, license plate, trunk, and roof antennas.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible stripes, badge, and light bar.
attribute_police_markings: Blue and red horizontal stripes run along both sides of the vehicle, with a large, multicolored police badge insignia on the front doors. The stripes are bold and extend from the front fender to the rear. No visible text such as 'POLICE' or department names are present.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted light bar with red, blue, and white segments is present, rectangular in shape and centrally positioned. No additional grille or rear emergency lights are visible.
attribute_police_insignia: A large, multicolored police badge insignia is visible on both front doors, featuring a star and shield design with gold, blue, and red elements.
attribute_license_plate: A white license plate is visible on both the front and rear of the vehicle, with dark text. No special markings or codes are discernible.
